flat.name: Flat
flat.description: Value applied as-is (multiplier = 1). The default for all modifiers.

per_x_money.name: Per X Money
per_x_money.description: Multiplied by the nation's current money stockpile divided by X, floored.

per_x_resource.name: Per X Resource
per_x_resource.description: Multiplied by the nation's current resource stockpile divided by X, floored.

per_x_shallow_and_deep_water_tiles.name: Per X Shallow+Deep Water Tiles
per_x_shallow_and_deep_water_tiles.description: Multiplied by combined shallow and deep water tiles divided by X, floored.

per_x_magic_nodes.name: Per X Magic Nodes
per_x_magic_nodes.description: Multiplied by the number of magic nodes owned by the nation divided by X, floored.

per_x_bloodthirsty_pops.name: Per X Bloodthirsty Pops
per_x_bloodthirsty_pops.description: Multiplied by the number of bloodthirsty pops in the nation divided by X, floored.

per_x_primary_culture_pops_world.name: Per X Primary Culture Pops (Worldwide)
per_x_primary_culture_pops_world.description: Multiplied by the total number of pops worldwide that share the nation's primary culture divided by X, floored.

per_x_primary_religion_pops_world.name: Per X Primary Religion Pops (Worldwide)
per_x_primary_religion_pops_world.description: Multiplied by the total number of pops worldwide that share the nation's primary religion divided by X, floored.

per_x_pops.name: Per X Pops In Nation
per_x_pops.description: Multiplied by the total number of pops in the nation divided by X, floored.

per_x_naval_units.name: Per X Naval Units
per_x_naval_units.description: Multiplied by the nation's total naval units divided by X, floored.

per_x_land_units.name: Per X Land Units
per_x_land_units.description: Multiplied by the nation's total land units divided by X, floored.

per_x_turns_library.name: Per X Turns with Library
per_x_turns_library.description: Multiplied by the number of turns the nation has had a library divided by X, floored.

per_x_terrain_tiles.name: Per X Tiles of Terrain
per_x_terrain_tiles.description: Multiplied by the count of a specific terrain type divided by X, floored. Choose a terrain.

per_x_district_category.name: Per X Districts of Category
per_x_district_category.description: Multiplied by districts matching a specific category divided by X, floored. Choose a category.

per_x_administration.name: Per X Administration
per_x_administration.description: Multiplied by the nation's administration value divided by X, floored.

per_x_resource_produced.name: Per X Resource Produced
per_x_resource_produced.description: Multiplied by the nation's current production of a specific resource divided by X, floored. Uses the production value from the previous calculation.

per_x_resource_nodes.name: Per X Resource Nodes (All)
per_x_resource_nodes.description: Multiplied by all nodes of a specific resource type in the nation's territory (active and inactive) divided by X, floored.
